name: Motion Wastebasket without Liner - Brightroom™
description:
Help keep your kitchen, laundry room or any other space clean with this Motion Wastebasket without Liner from Brightroom™. Made from fingerprint-resistant stainless steel with a silver finish, this wastebasket features a quiet-closing, motion-activated lid for easy, hands-free use. It's designed with a 45-liter capacity to store plenty of trash and requires four AA alkaline batteries.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
